name: Bamboo
description: Explosive growth intelligence — up to 91 cm/day, the fastest-growing plant on Earth. Underground rhizome network stores energy for years before synchronized mass flowering events across entire species populations worldwide. Hollow cylindrical geometry achieves maximum strength-to-weight ratio. Clonal colony intelligence where genetically identical culms share resources through the rhizome mesh.

core_attributes.pattern: explosive vertical growth, rhizome energy storage, synchronized mass flowering
